steps.title: Check the sentence core
steps.content: The sentence core is her 2019 novel Gingerbread offers a delicious twist. The title sits directly between the subject noun and the verb, so no punctuation should separate the subject from its verb.

steps.title: Remove interrupting marks
steps.content: Choice A adds a dash that interrupts the subject before the verb. Choice B puts a comma between the subject and verb. Choice D uses a colon where no explanation or list follows the title. The remaining choice supplies the title with no unnecessary punctuation. The answer is C.
